name: IGET Bar Pro
description: The IGET Bar Pro packs 10,000 puffs into a sleek disposable design. Enjoy rich, satisfying flavours with every draw.

flavours.name: Strawberry Cranberry Bliss
flavours.description: The IGET Bar PRO Strawberry Cranberry Bliss combines the juicy sweetness of strawberries with the tart boldness of cranberries for a bright and blissful vape.

flavours.name: Raspberry Cherry Blackberry
flavours.description: The IGET PRO Raspberry Cherry Blackberry combines the tangy brightness of raspberries with the lush sweetness of cherries and the bold depth of blackberries for a smooth and vibrant vape.

flavours.name: Strawberry White Peach Ice Mist
flavours.description: The IGET Bar PRO Strawberry White Peach Ice Mist combines the lush sweetness of strawberries with velvety white peach and a cool icy mist for a smooth and refreshing vape.

flavours.name: Raspberry Pomegranate Ice Blast
flavours.description: The IGET Bar PRO Raspberry Pomegranate Ice Blast combines the sweet juiciness of raspberries with the rich tartness of pomegranate and a frosty ice finish for a crisp and invigorating vape.

flavours.name: Blackberry Yogurt Ice Berry
flavours.description: The IGET Bar PRO Blackberry Yogurt Ice Berry combines the rich tartness of ripe blackberries with creamy yogurt and a cool icy finish for a bold and indulgent vape.

flavours.name: Dynamic Mint
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Pro Dynamic Mint combines the crisp, refreshing taste of cool mint with an invigorating icy kick for a clean and energising vape.

flavours.name: Blackberry Ice
flavours.description: The Blackberry Ice IGET Bar PRO captures the sweet and juicy flavour of ripe blackberries with no trace of bitterness, and an icy menthol finish.

flavours.name: Passion Fruit Peach Ice Tea
flavours.description: The IGET Bar PRO Passion Fruit Peach Ice Tea combines exotic passion fruit with mellow peach and a chilled iced tea twist for a fruity and refreshing vape.

flavours.name: Grapefruit Guava Lemon Ice
flavours.description: The Grapefruit Guava Lemon Ice IGET Bar PRO is a balanced mix of fresh, juicy guava, zesty lemons and an icy menthol finish.

flavours.name: Orange Fanta Soda
flavours.description: The Orange Fanta Soda IGET Bar PRO provides the taste of a fresh and juicy oranges with a refreshingly yummy fanta blast.

flavours.name: Raspberry Grape
flavours.description: The Raspberry Grape IGET Bar PRO features a delicious raspberry and grape mix that will leave you wanting more.

flavours.name: Strawberry Raspberry
flavours.description: The Strawberry Raspberry IGET Bar PRO is a rare flavour, mixing strawberries and raspberries with a hint of an ice cool menthol.

flavours.name: Blueberry Ice
flavours.description: The Blueberry Ice IGET Bar PRO is a perfect blend of tangy blueberry sweetness with an icy, refreshing menthol finish.

flavours.name: Fruity Skittles
flavours.description: The IGET Bar PRO Fruity Skittles combines a rainbow medley of sweet and tangy fruit flavours with a candy-like burst for a fun and vibrant vape.

flavours.name: Blueberry Raspberry
flavours.description: The Blueberry Raspberry IGET Bar PRO is a perfect blend of tangy blueberry and raspberry sweetness.

flavours.name: Strawberry Kiwi Ice
flavours.description: The Strawberry Kiwi Ice IGET Bar PRO is a balanced mix of juicy, fresh strawberry and sweet kiwi flavours with an undertone of icy menthol.

flavours.name: Kiwi Pineapple
flavours.description: The Kiwi Pineapple IGET Bar PRO is a balanced mix of fresh juicy kiwis and sweet sweet pineapples.

flavours.name: Grape Ice
flavours.description: The Grape Ice IGET Bar PRO is the perfect choice for people who love the taste of grape along with the invigorating cooling sensation of menthol.

flavours.name: Chupa Chups Strawberry
flavours.description: The IGET Bar PRO Chup@ Chups Strawberry captures the nostalgic sweetness of classic strawberry candy, offering a rich, fruity flavour perfectly balanced with a smooth finish. This delightful blend is perfect for those who enjoy a sweet and fruity vaping experience that transports you back to your childhood.

flavours.name: Strawberry Watermelon Ice
flavours.description: The Strawberry Watermelon Ice IGET Bar PRO is the perfect blend of two popular fruits with a hint of an icy menthol undertone.

flavours.name: Blackberry Pomegranate Cherry
flavours.description: The Blackberry Pomegranate Cherry IGET Bar Pro contains a unique blend of sweet cherry and pomegranates with a delicious blackberry twist.

flavours.name: Chupa Chups Grape
flavours.description: The IGET Bar PRO Chup@ Chups Grape captures the nostalgic sweetness of classic grape candy, offering a rich, fruity flavour perfectly balanced with a smooth finish. This delightful blend is perfect for those who enjoy a sweet and fruity vaping experience that transports you back to your childhood.

flavours.name: Mango Ice
flavours.description: The IGET Bar PRO Mango Ice combines the juicy sweetness of ripe tropical mangoes with a refreshing icy blast for a smooth and invigorating vape.

flavours.name: Strawberry Passion Fruit Mango
flavours.description: The IGET Bar PRO Strawberry Passion Fruit Mango combines juicy strawberries with tangy passion fruit and golden mango for a vibrant and tropical vape.

flavours.name: Blueberry Raspberry Bubble Gum
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Pro Blueberry Raspberry Bubble Gum combines the sweet juiciness of blueberries with tangy raspberries and a nostalgic bubble gum twist for a playful and satisfying vape.

flavours.name: Cherry Pomegranate
flavours.description: The Cherry Pomegranate IGET Bar PRO contains a unique blend of sweet cherry and pomegranates.

reviews.text: The taste is seriously next level. Every puff is flavourful and satisfying.

reviews.text: Seriously impressed. The flavour lasts right to the end and the puff count is accurate.
